metadata.description: planfi skills — financial planning and real-estate investment analysis powered by the public planfi MCP.

plugins.name: str-investment-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyze short-term-rental (Airbnb/VRBO) property investments by city: cash flow, cash-on-cash, cap rate, break-even occupancy, risk flag, managed-vs-self comparison, and a hold-period return (or indefinite buy-and-hold). Thin orchestration over the planfi MCP.

plugins.name: financial-forecast
plugins.description: Build a complete FIRE / financial forecast: net-worth projection, FIRE age, Monte Carlo success rate, insights, action plan, what-if scenario comparisons, childcare cost + dependent-care FSA / Child & Dependent Care Credit / Child Tax Credit offsets with a corrected second-income tradeoff, and education/estate deep-dives including a 529→Roth rollover (SECURE 2.0) + 5-year gift-tax-averaged 529 superfunding optimizer, plus estate- and inheritance-tax exposure covering the 6 inheritance-tax states (PA/NJ/KY/IA/MD/NE, taxed by beneficiary relationship class regardless of estate size) and ~12 estate-tax states (MA/NY/OR/WA + CT/DC/HI/IL/ME/MD/MN/RI/VT). Thin orchestration over the planfi MCP.

plugins.name: rent-vs-buy
plugins.description: Rent vs buy: breakeven home-appreciation rate (pre & after tax), per-horizon BUY-vs-RENT net worth, payoff/crossover years, invest-the-difference opportunity cost, and — if they already own — home-equity extraction (HELOC revolving draw/repay, cash-out refi, or reverse mortgage) as a liquidity/decumulation lever instead of selling. Thin orchestration over the planfi MCP.

plugins.name: tax-optimizer
plugins.description: Cut taxes across accounts and years: broad tax optimization (asset location, tax-loss harvesting, charitable), multi-year ISO/conversion timing (AMT/NIIT/IRMAA-aware), Roth conversion ladders, mega-backdoor Roth space, advanced surtaxes (NIIT/AMT/state), tax-gain harvesting (how much long-term gain you can realize at the 0% capital-gains rate before NIIT/IRMAA bites), tax-loss harvesting (analyze_tax_loss_harvesting — harvest lot-level unrealized losses to offset realized gains and up to $3,000 of ordinary income, flag wash sales, suggest replacement securities), retirement relocation / state-tax arbitrage with full 50-state + DC progressive single/MFJ brackets (compare the lifetime after-tax cost of retiring in one state vs another), the federal Saver's Credit (50/20/10% of retirement contributions for lower/moderate income), and 72(t)/SEPP substantially-equal-payment sizing for penalty-free access to retirement money before 59½. Thin orchestration over the planfi MCP.

plugins.name: equity-comp-planner
plugins.description: Value and tax employer equity (RSUs, ISOs, NSOs, ESPP), find the ISO/AMT crossover, and assess single-stock concentration risk with a tax-aware diversification plan. Thin orchestration over the planfi MCP.

plugins.name: retirement-income
plugins.description: Plan retirement decumulation: tax-smart withdrawal order, dynamic/variable spending strategies (Guyton-Klinger guardrails, VPW, spending smile, bucket+buffer vs a static 4% SWR), Social Security claiming age, ACA healthcare bridge before Medicare, projected RMDs with a tax-torpedo and Roth-conversion-runway readout (the low-income years before RMDs start at 73/75), Medicare IRMAA tier and surcharge-cliff lookup, estate-tax exposure, guaranteed income (pension lump-sum vs lifetime monthly, SPIA/QLAC vs DIY portfolio), deferred/accumulation annuity products (fixed-indexed FIA cap/participation crediting, RILA buffer/floor, multi-year-guaranteed MYGA, and variable annuities with a GLWB rollup rider) with non-qualified exclusion-ratio tax and 1035 exchanges, a bond/TIPS ladder income floor that guarantees the first N years of spending (sequence-of-returns protection), a mass-market safe-cash ladder for the same near-term need (FDIC-insured CD ladders — brokered vs bank, early-withdrawal penalty, callable — plus I-Bonds and Series EE savings bonds with their purchase caps and federal tax-deferral / state exemption), and long-term-care cost exposure with a self-insure vs traditional vs hybrid LTC-policy tradeoff (including the impact on a surviving spouse's plan). Thin orchestration over the planfi MCP.

plugins.name: debt-and-cashflow
plugins.description: Pay down debt and route surplus cash optimally: avalanche/snowball debt payoff order, balance-transfer / debt-consolidation break-even (personal loan vs 0% transfer vs status quo), mortgage prepay vs invest, refinance break-even, a next-best-dollar funding waterfall, student-loan strategy (IDR / PSLF / refinance vs aggressive payoff), emergency-fund / cash-runway sizing (months-of-runway target from job stability, dependents, and income type, plus a too-much-cash check), and finance vs lease vs pay-cash car analysis (real-dollar net cost over your hold horizon, net of resale, interest, and the opportunity cost of cash). Thin orchestration over the planfi MCP.

plugins.name: fire-tracker
plugins.description: Track FIRE progress: are you already financially independent / can you coast, how you benchmark against peers, your Lean / Fat / Barista FIRE numbers (incl. a part-time-income bridge), which net-worth milestones you've hit, and whether you can hit a target retirement age (with the easiest levers to pull). Thin orchestration over the planfi MCP.

plugins.name: self-employed-planner
plugins.description: Plan self-employed / business-owner retirement: max Solo 401(k) vs SEP-IRA vs SIMPLE contribution room, the §199A QBI deduction (thresholds, W-2/UBIA cap, SSTB phaseout), the S-corp reasonable-salary tradeoff (payroll tax vs QBI vs retirement room), and estimated/quarterly tax & 90%/110% safe-harbor planning to avoid underpayment penalties. Thin orchestration over the planfi MCP.

plugins.name: relocation-planner
plugins.description: Compare retirement relocation / state-tax arbitrage by orchestrating the public planfi MCP — how much a move (e.g. CA→TX/FL) saves in state income tax (full 50-state + DC progressive single/MFJ brackets), property tax, estate tax, and cost of living, and whether it's worth it.

plugins.name: long-term-rental-analyzer
plugins.description: Long-term-rental after-tax analyzer: 27.5-yr depreciation shelter, ~25% recapture at sale, 1031 like-kind deferral, and a Schedule E P&L (rent, vacancy, opex, NOI). Thin orchestration over the planfi MCP.

plugins.name: startup-equity-planner
plugins.description: Model the irreversible 30-day 83(b) early-exercise election and the QSBS section 1202 gain exclusion (up to $10M/10x basis) for startup founders, early employees, and C-corp sellers — by orchestrating the public planfi MCP.

plugins.name: portfolio-rebalancer
plugins.description: Cross-account, tax-aware rebalance trade generator: takes holdings across taxable / traditional IRA / Roth / 401(k) plus an IPS target allocation, detects drift beyond the rebalancing band, and returns the actual buy/sell trade list to return to target — rebalancing tax-advantaged accounts first (zero gain realized), avoiding short-term gains in taxable, harvesting loss lots within the wash-sale ±30-day window, and routing new contributions to underweight classes before selling. Thin orchestration over the planfi MCP.

plugins.name: comprehensive-plan
plugins.description: One comprehensive financial plan in a single deliverable — retirement/FIRE projection with Monte Carlo backtesting, 529 college funding status, estate-tax exposure, and life/disability insurance protection gaps, every number engine-computed.
